log: === INITIATIVE ===
Young Red Dragon: 5 (d20:5 + 0)
Astral Elf — Unarmored Caster: 3 (d20:1 + 2)
=== ROUND 1 ===
--- Young Red Dragon's turn ---
Young Red Dragon descends and moves from (8,0) to (0,0) [40ft].
Young Red Dragon attack 1: [d20:3+10=13 vs AC 15] MISS!
Young Red Dragon attack 2: [d20:16+10=26 vs AC 15] HIT! 19 damage. Astral Elf — Unarmored Caster HP: 48/67
Young Red Dragon attack 3: [d20:18+10=28 vs AC 15] HIT! 19 damage. Astral Elf — Unarmored Caster HP: 29/67
⚡ Astral Elf — Unarmored Caster casts Silvery Barbs! Forced reroll: d20:4 total 14 vs AC 15 — now MISSES!
--- Astral Elf — Unarmored Caster's turn ---
Astral Elf — Unarmored Caster casts Hypnotic Pattern (3rd level)
→ AoE hits 1 target(s)
→ Young Red Dragon WIS save: FAIL
→ Young Red Dragon gains: charmed_hp, incapacitated
=== ROUND 2 ===
Young Red Dragon is incapacitated — skipping turn.
--- Astral Elf — Unarmored Caster's turn ---
Astral Elf — Unarmored Caster casts Dissonant Whispers (1st level)
→ Young Red Dragon WIS save: [15 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ 14 damage.
→ Young Red Dragon takes damage — Hypnotic Pattern charm breaks!
→ Young Red Dragon gains: must_use_reaction_to_move_away
=== ROUND 3 ===
--- Young Red Dragon's turn ---
Young Red Dragon attack 1: [d20:2+10=12 vs AC 15] MISS!
Young Red Dragon attack 2: [d20:12+10=22 vs AC 15] HIT! 20 damage. Astral Elf — Unarmored Caster HP: 28/67
→ Concentration save: [18 vs DC 10] MAINTAINED!
Young Red Dragon attack 3: [d20:19+10=29 vs AC 15] HIT! 16 damage. Astral Elf — Unarmored Caster HP: 12/67
→ Astral Elf — Unarmored Caster loses concentration on Hypnotic Pattern
⚡ Astral Elf — Unarmored Caster casts Silvery Barbs! Forced reroll: d20:6 total 16 vs AC 15 — still hits.
--- Astral Elf — Unarmored Caster's turn ---
Astral Elf — Unarmored Caster casts Greater Invisibility (4th level)
Astral Elf — Unarmored Caster casts Healing Word (1st level)
→ Heals Astral Elf — Unarmored Caster for 6. HP: 18/67
=== ROUND 4 ===
--- Young Red Dragon's turn ---
Young Red Dragon attack 1: [d20:19+10=29 vs AC 15] HIT! 22 damage. Astral Elf — Unarmored Caster HP: 0/67
=== ENCOUNTER ENDED — Winner: ENEMY after 4 rounds ===
